subcodes.first_line: We make mention of him who was named Abu'l-Qásim through this remembrance, wherewith the birds warble upon the branches [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر من سمی بابی القاسم بهذا الذکر الذی به غنت الطیور علی الافنان ان
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
